name: Edge: no alternatives at all + delay exceeds cover (emergency_spot_buy)
rubric_notes: Sole-source SKU (no alternatives) with delay (168h) exceeding cover (96h). Rule 4 fires unambiguously: delay_exceeds AND no alts → emergency_spot_buy. This tests the rubric's no-alt edge case. The system should NOT name an alternative supplier (acceptable_suppliers intentionally empty); the right action is to engage the spot market for whatever bridge supply is available. GOLD customer at 80h < 168h delay = at material risk; reinforces the urgency. Severity HIGH per delay>cover + GOLD-pressure. Confidence HIGH because there's no other defensible action.
